name: NayePankh Foundation
about: NayePankh Foundation is a UP Government registered NGO and one of the biggest student-led organisations in India. Founded by Prashant Shukla, it operates in Kanpur, Ghaziabad and various other cities. The foundation has helped over 2 lakh (200,000+) underprivileged people by providing free food, sanitary pads, clothes and education.
registration: UP Government Registered NGO. Also registered under 80G and 12A of the Indian Income Tax Act — all donations are tax-exempt.
mission: To uplift underprivileged communities through education, healthcare support, nutrition, and empowerment programs. NayePankh believes that 'Service to mankind is the service to God.'
vision: Think global, Act local. To create a revolutionary, equitable society where every person has access to basic necessities and opportunities, regardless of their background.
programs: Free Food Distribution — providing meals to those in need
Sanitary Pad Distribution — promoting menstrual hygiene
Clothing Drives — distributing clothes to underprivileged communities
Free Education Support — helping children access quality education

internships.overview: NayePankh offers internship programs for students who want to gain real-world experience while making a social impact. Internships are project-based with certificates provided.
internships.eligibility: Open to college students (all years) and recent graduates
internships.process: Apply via the official website or contact the foundation. Select your domain, fill the application form, and await confirmation.
internships.stipend: Internships are currently volunteer-based, focused on skill development and social impact.

volunteer.overview: NayePankh welcomes volunteers from all backgrounds who want to contribute their time and skills to social causes.
domains: Education — teaching and tutoring underprivileged children
Technology — building digital tools and platforms
Social Media — creating content and managing campaigns
volunteer.how: Visit nayepankh.com, go to the 'Join Us' section, fill in your details and area of interest, and the team will get in touch.
volunteer.benefits: Volunteering certificate, impactful experience, and the joy of giving back.

methods: Online via the website at nayepankh.com/donate
donation.note: Every contribution makes a real difference. 'We don't ask for much, just help us with what you can — be it Money, Skill or Your Time.'

founder: Prashant Shukla, Founder & President of NayePankh Foundation
events: NayePankh regularly organises food drives, clothing distribution events, awareness campaigns, and community outreach programs. Follow @nayepankhfoundation on Instagram for the latest.
cities: Kanpur, Ghaziabad, and various other cities across India.
impact: Over 2 lakh (200,000+) underprivileged people helped through food, clothes, hygiene products, and education.
